ibis.orig: Ministers must now decide whether to accept IIAC’s recommendations
ibis.text: Should ministers accept the Industrial Injuries Advisory Council's recommendations?

ibis.orig: the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) was carrying out a detailed assessment of the report’s recommendations
ibis.text: The Department for Work and Pensions is carrying out a detailed assessment of the report's recommendations.

ibis.orig: Debate about including long covid as a prescribed disease
ibis.text: Should long covid be included as a prescribed disease?

ibis.orig: IIAC therefore considered there was not sufficient evidence at that time to recommend general prescription for long covid/post-Covid syndrome
ibis.text: The Industrial Injuries Advisory Council considered that there was not sufficient evidence to recommend general prescription for long covid or post-Covid syndrome.

ibis.orig: current understanding of the underlying pathophysiology, temporal course, and predictable effects of the key symptoms of Post-COVID syndrome is limited, as is the ability to diagnose the condition objectively
ibis.text: Current understanding of the underlying pathophysiology, temporal course, and predictable effects of the key symptoms of post-Covid syndrome is limited, and the ability to diagnose the condition objectively is also limited.

ibis.orig: the Council is unable to recommend prescription for this condition at this time
ibis.text: The Council is unable to recommend prescription for long covid at this time.

ibis.orig: Calls for greater recognition and support for long covid
ibis.text: Is there a need for greater recognition and support for long covid?

ibis.orig: Patients, charities and health care professionals have raised concerns about recognition and awareness of long covid, and difficulties in accessing appropriate medical assessments and support
ibis.text: Patients, charities, and healthcare professionals believe there is a need for greater recognition and awareness of long covid, as well as better access to medical assessments and support.

ibis.orig: The report highlighted a lack of awareness and knowledge of the condition and support services amongst GPs, mixed experience of long Covid clinics and a lack of holistic support
ibis.text: A report highlighted a lack of awareness and knowledge of the condition and support services among GPs, mixed experiences of long covid clinics, and a lack of holistic support.
